summary: Phase 56 testing completed - 5-point fix verification for signature aspect/alignment, radio no-label, page sync, and date alignment. All 11 backend code review tests passed. Frontend signing flow verified working.

warnings.issue: React warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component
warnings.note: This is a known React warning, not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 56 code changes verified in all 5 files:
1. InteractiveDocumentViewer.js - Radio labels hidden (DocuSign-style), aria-label for accessibility, signature/initials alignment via flex justify
2. MultiPageVisualBuilder.js - Page sync fix: page: currentPage assignment in pagination mode drag handler
3. package_public_routes.py - Signature aspect-fit using fitz.Pixmap, horizontal alignment per textAlign, radio label NOT drawn
4. package_public_link_routes.py - Same signature aspect-fit + alignment, radio label removed
5. PublicDocumentViewEnhanced.js - pdf-lib signature/initials aspect-fit + alignment per textAlign

success_rate.frontend: 100% (signing flow, guided nav, page navigation all working)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test document with public token RL4N90Q3dGU3jG6yfRK8jziAnZDvOBkS-J0XTc2OsYc
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 56 fixes verified via code review tests. No templates with radio fields found in current data - radio no-label fix verified via code inspection. Signature aspect-fit and alignment code verified. Page sync fix verified in MultiPageVisualBuilder.js. Public document signing flow working correctly with guided navigation (Start/Next/Previous/Finish buttons).

radio_no_label.details: InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: optionLabel NOT rendered, only aria-label for accessibility. Backend: Phase 56 comment confirms label NOT drawn in final PDF.

signature_aspect_align.details: Backend uses fitz.Pixmap for aspect ratio, computes aspect-fit sub-rect, aligns per textAlign. Frontend pdf-lib uses same logic.

initials_aspect_align.details: Same implementation as signature in both backend and frontend

date_alignment.details: Date fields support textAlign property, verified in template data

field_size_parity.details: Field dimensions (width/height) preserved in template data
